name: workbuddy
description: Operate workbuddy from Codex with repo setup, pipeline monitoring, troubleshooting, and operator workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Operate the workbuddy issue-driven agent pipeline from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installable Codex plugin for workbuddy. Includes guided repo setup, pipeline monitoring, troubleshooting, and operator-facing workflows adapted from the Claude plugin layout.
defaultPrompt: Use setup-repo to onboard owner/repo for workbuddy.
Use pipeline-monitor to diagnose a stuck workbuddy issue.
Use workbuddy-guide to explain serve and coordinator-worker modes.
